# Vendored Base Fault Proof Contracts

This directory contains a source copy of the Base contracts used by the fault
proof system.

Source repository: `https://github.com/base/contracts`
Source tag: `v8.1.1`
Source commit: `1baa168c9db6a946ae47863ea07295bedb3599a6`

Imported paths:

- `src/dispute`
- `src/cannon`
- `src/libraries`
- `src/L1/ProxyAdminOwnedBase.sol`
- `src/universal/ReinitializableBase.sol`
- `src/universal/WETH98.sol`
- fault-proof transitive interfaces under `interfaces`

These files are vendored as normal repository files, not as a submodule.
